summary: Completed testing of GRC Auditoría Integration and Excel Import Features (Iteration 15). All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Catálogo Riesgos and Hallazgos Auditoría pages have working 'Plantilla' and 'Importar' buttons. Auditoría del Sistema page shows GRC entity filters (Dominio, Control, Riesgo, Hallazgo) working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/catalogo-riesgos/plantilla/descargar returns Excel file (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/catalogo-riesgos/import/excel endpoint exists (422 without file)
Backend: POST /api/catalogo-riesgos/import/excel rejects non-Excel files (400)
Backend: GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria/plantilla/descargar returns Excel file (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/hallazgos-auditoria/import/excel endpoint exists (422 without file)
Backend: POST /api/hallazgos-auditoria/import/excel rejects non-Excel files (400)
Backend: GET /api/historial returns audit history with total count
Backend: GET /api/historial?entidad=dominio filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/historial?entidad=control filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/historial?entidad=catalogo_riesgo filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/historial?entidad=hallazgo_auditoria filters correctly
Backend: Creating dominio creates audit log entry in historial_cambios
Backend: Creating riesgo in catalog creates audit log entry
Backend: Creating hallazgo creates audit log entry
UI: Catálogo de Riesgos page has 'Plantilla' button (data-testid='btn-descargar-plantilla')
UI: Catálogo de Riesgos page has 'Importar' button (data-testid='btn-importar-riesgos')
UI: Catálogo de Riesgos import modal opens correctly
UI: Hallazgos de Auditoría page has 'Plantilla' button (data-testid='btn-descargar-plantilla-hallazgos')
UI: Hallazgos de Auditoría page has 'Importar' button (data-testid='btn-importar-hallazgos')
UI: Hallazgos de Auditoría import modal opens correctly
UI: Auditoría del Sistema page shows entity filter dropdown
UI: Entity filter includes 'Dominio' option
UI: Entity filter includes 'Control' option
UI: Entity filter includes 'Riesgo (Catálogo)' option
UI: Entity filter includes 'Hallazgo de Auditoría' option
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_DOMINIO_*, TEST-R-*, TEST-AUD-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested GRC Auditoría Integration and Excel Import features. Key endpoints verified: GET /api/catalogo-riesgos/plantilla/descargar, POST /api/catalogo-riesgos/import/excel, GET /api/hallazgos-auditoria/plantilla/descargar, POST /api/hallazgos-auditoria/import/excel. The Auditoría del Sistema page (under Configuración tab) has entity filters for all GRC modules. The historial_cambios collection stores audit logs for dominio, control, catalogo_riesgo, and hallazgo_auditoria entities.
